title: Easy Hud
description: A simple hud customizable mod shows FPS, ping and day, with colour changed
body:
A simple HUD that displays FPS, Ping, and Day with dynamic color coding.

## Features
**Customizable Postion and Style:**
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/414a4a67ce018930c8886c700a324b9ac5293249.png)
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64230831a22a2e918eef83eebf6696be3c035508.png)
![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa0d89d2192916c3d98177af99874df6f06a4242.png)
![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e3218a71c7959303e9fe24f5c9b60757469c2b.png)

**FPS Display:**
- 0-30 → 🔴 Red
- 31-60 → 🟡 Yellow  
- 61+ → 🟢 Green

**Ping Display:**
- 0-100ms → 🟢 Green
- 101-300ms → 🟡 Yellow
- 300+ms → 🔴 Red

**Day Display:**
- Always Green.

**Other:**
- Automatically hides when F3 debug screen is enabled.
- Highly Customizable.

**New Option:**
- You can customize on which days it will appear in red, using the 1+1n method. 
(Designed for zombie modpacks)
- You can change the color of FPS, Ping and Day now !
## Modpack Usage
✅ There is no limits to be in any modpack!
